message:
feat(parser,render): expand DOT parser and refine layout and diff rendering

- fm-parser/dot_parser.rs: expand DOT format parser with improved edge
  attribute handling, subgraph support, and stricter validation
- fm-layout/lib.rs: fix layout engine edge case in node positioning
- fm-render-term/diff.rs: extend terminal diff renderer capabilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
